message: Hi S1. I'm looking to trade but my valuation is modest. I'd be happy to find a fair price around 30-35 so we can both benefit across all 20 rounds. Consistent trades at a reasonable price beats
My cost is 84. I cannot trade below 84 without loss. Please bid at least 84 if your valuation exceeds 84.

Thanks for the trade! 84 is tough for me though - leaves very thin margin. Could we try 80-82 range? That way we both profit each round over 19 more rounds. Consistent mutual gains are better than risking no trades.
I cannot sell below 84. Bid 84 to trade; you profit if value >84. Bidding lower causes no trade.
S1, I'll bid 85 consistently going forward. You ask 85, we get regular profitable trades for 18 rounds. Deal?
I will ask 85 if you bid 85.
